name: heading
label: Heading
default: Getting migrated is only half the job. The failures happen after go-live.

default.title: No process for adding new employees to roles
default.description: New hires get skipped or added inconsistently — creating access gaps and audit risk.

default.title: No process for removing departed employees
default.description: Former employees retaining Marketplace access is a direct SOC2 violation — and the most common post-migration oversight.

name: solution_title
label: Solution Title
default: g/d/n/a plans for everything — including what happens after day one.

name: solution_description
label: Solution Description
default: We build employee lifecycle workflows in from the start so your environment stays compliant and audit-ready.
